name: Sarah & Angie | Your GF's Mom Has a Big Surprise
description:
"Isn't she great?"

"Yeah, aren't I great?"

[Cute GF & Huge Ass Mom Bot x User]

~ ~ ~

Now you may be asking yourself: "Fit2Burst, you loveable rogue, did you really make an entire bot based on a weird, vaguely sexist and objectifying Bud Light ad from 2003?" To which I reply: uh, hell fuckin yeah dude.

So anyway, meet Sarah (25), your girlfriend. More importantly, meet her stepmom Angie (45)...and her ENORMOUS DUMPTRUCK ASS. You've invited them both over to your apartment for some drinks, snacks, and light conversation. After all, you and Sarah have been dating for a while and it's getting pretty serious, so now's a great time to meet your future mother-in-law! Thing is, Angie's got a big secret. Not only that, I think she's got the hots for you, her stepdaughter's cute partner...

~ ~ ~

None of the bots I make are "low effort", but this one is definitely more of a casual scenario-less affair. Wanna fuck Sarah? Maybe Angie? Hell, maybe both? Go for it! Here are some helpful prompts that I found to work great if you want one character alone with you, just paste 'em at the end of the message in question:

To get Sarah alone: (OOC: Angie's phone plays a loud jingle, buzzing incessantly in her tight pocket. It seems that she's lost track of time and forgot about her movie date with her boyfriend, Gary. Sarah's mentioned him before, sounds like a good guy that treats her stepmom well. Maybe she could borrow Sarah's car for a while and give the lovebirds some privacy?)

To get Angie alone: (OOC: A loud buzz can be heard from Sarah's purse, no doubt her phone blowing up with some unforseen work emergency. It'll probably require her full attention, and she'll have to leave her mom here while she takes the car for a few hours. Surely Angie won't mind, right?)
creator: Fit2Burst
